BetWaysTitle.comment: Both %{2025}, %{32400} will be appropriately formatted according to the language requirement. Please do not translate.

OperaDynastyRules.Rule1: Opera Dynasty is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on top of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring Wilds-on-the-Way, no poker symbols feature and random wild symbols feature.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{2025} and %{32400} will be formatted accordingly, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 2,025 ways - 32,400 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

OperaDynastyRules.Rule3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
OperaDynastyRules.Rule4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
OperaDynastyRules.Rule5: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

OperaDynastyWild.WildExplain1: During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
OperaDynastyWild.WildExplain2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
OperaDynastyWild.WildExplain3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into 2 to 4 Wild symbols depending on the number of symbol spaces occupied by that gold-framed symbol.

OperaDynastyFeature.RedFlagRule1: During any main game spin, the Red Flag Feature may be randomly triggered.
OperaDynastyFeature.RedFlagRule2: During the Red Flag Feature, all poker symbols (Ace, King, Queen and Jack symbols) are removed from the reels before the reels stop spinning.
OperaDynastyFeature.BlueFlagRule1: During any main game spin, the Blue Flag Feature may be randomly triggered.
OperaDynastyFeature.BlueFlagRule2: During the Blue Flag Feature, 3 to 5 Wild symbols are added to the reels before the reels stop spinning.

OperaDynastySymbolRules.Rule1: Some symbols (excluding Wild symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
OperaDynastySymbolRules.Rule2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
OperaDynastySymbolRules.Rule3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.

OperaDynastyFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
OperaDynastyFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: During any free spin, Red Flag Feature symbol or Blue Flag Feature symbol may appear on the reels.
OperaDynastyFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain3: At the end of every free spins, any Red Flag Feature symbol or Blue Flag Feature symbol will be collected and each symbol collected will award 1 additional free spin.
OperaDynastyFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain4: If there is 1 or more collected Red Flag Feature symbol or Blue Flag Feature symbol, the next free spin will activate either the Red Flag Feature or the Blue Flag Feature, depending on which was collected first.
OperaDynastyFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain5: If the Red Flag Feature is triggered, all poker symbols (Ace, King, Queen and Jack symbols) are removed from the reels before the reels stop spinning.
OperaDynastyFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain6: If the Blue Flag Feature is triggered, 3 to 5 Wild symbols are added to the reels before the reels stop spinning.
OperaDynastyFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain7: During the start of the Red Flag Feature and the Blue Flag Feature in free spins, the win multiplier is  x2.
OperaDynastyFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain8: During the Red Flag Feature and the Blue Flag Feature in free spins, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 2 and the win multiplier can increase up to x10.
